public:: true
title:: Axiom — Renaissance Architecture ⊑ Architectural Period
ontology:: true

# Subclass Axiom

An explicit, content-addressed axiom asserting that *Renaissance
Architecture* is a subclass of *Architectural Period*. The axiom IRI is
the truncated SHA-256 of the canonical triple form
`(subject, SubClassOf, object)`.

### OntologyBlock

  "@context": "https://narrativegoldmine.com/context/v1.jsonld",
